headline: A Look At Centene’s (CNC) Valuation After Its Recent Share Price Rebound
summary: Centene stock in focus after recent price move Centene (CNC) has come onto investors’ radar after a recent share price move, with the stock closing at US$41.09 and showing mixed return patterns across the past week, month and past 3 months. See our latest analysis for Centene. The recent 1 day share price return of 5.55% and 1 month share price return of 24.59% contrast with a 1 year total shareholder return of 33.27% decline, suggesting short term momentum after a weaker multi year...
